summary: 10 unread this morning, with a few things worth your attention. Your kid's school (RRCA PST) sent April event updates — there's a Frio Pop on the blacktop on April 9, just two days away. LifeMD also notified you that your appointment was rescheduled, so log into the portal to see the new time. That Texas vehicle registration for your Mazda has been expired since December 2025 and is still sitting in your inbox — probably time to actually deal with that one.

items.subject: It's time to renew your registration
items.snippet: Your 2014 Mazda (VIN ending 1256) registration expired December 2025 — this notice has been sitting since January and is now 3+ months overdue.

items.subject: Time to pick a monthly PayPal Debit category
items.snippet: Time to choose your 5% cash back category for your PayPal Debit Card for this month.

items.subject: RRCA PST April Updates
items.snippet: School parent update with upcoming events including a Frio Pop on the blacktop on April 9 and other April calendar items.

items.subject: Your appointment has been rescheduled
items.snippet: Your LifeMD appointment has been rescheduled — log in to the patient portal to view the updated details.

items.subject: A shipment from order #69301 is on the way
items.snippet: Your NASASpaceflight.com order #69301 is en route — track via DHL eCommerce.

items.subject: Order #69301 confirmed
items.snippet: Your NASASpaceflight shop order is confirmed and being prepped for shipment.

items.subject: UAS Registration Renewal Reminder
items.snippet: Your UAS drone registration will expire within 180 days — renew at FAADroneZone to stay compliant.

items.subject: 😺 What does OpenAI see coming
items.snippet: AI newsletter covering what OpenAI predicts for the future, plus Netflix and Meta's new open-source AI compromise.

items.subject: 😺 🎙️ We're LIVE: From "I Ask ChatGPT Things" to 10 Hours Saved / Wk
items.snippet: AI productivity newsletter with a podcast episode on saving 10 hours per week using AI tools.

items.subject: Spin Into Spring With Up to $5,000, Ryan!
items.snippet: Wheel of Fortune promotional email with a spring sweepstakes for up to $5,000.
